headline: OKLO - The $25 Stock That Hit $193 And Then Lost Most Of It
summary: In October 2025, a company with zero revenue, no operating reactors, and a product still years away from commercialization briefly crossed a $30 billion valuation. That company was Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO.

headline: AirJoule Technologies Schedules Release of First Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call
summary: RONAN, Mont., May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AirJoule Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: AIRJ) (“AirJoule Technologies” or the “Company”), a leading platform technology that unleashes the power of water from air, today announced that it will report its first quarter 2026 results after market close on Thursday, May 14, 2026. headline: GE Vernova, ENKA launch 852MW Kırklareli plant in Türkiye
summary: The facility is Türkiye’s first HA‑powered plant, marking a major milestone in modernising the country’s power generation fleet.
